certificate.module_name: Canonical Ltd. Ubuntu 22.04 Libgcrypt Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified Section 11 in the Security Policy.
certificate.description: The Canonical Ltd. Ubuntu 22.04 libgcrypt is a software library implementing general purpose cryptographic algorithms

vendor.name: Canonical Ltd.
